headline: 2 Reasons to Like ABBV and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: Over the past six months, AbbVie’s shares (currently trading at $211.15) have posted a disappointing 9.8% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 11.5% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
